payload.answer: Acknowledged. I will note that Sam joined Point72 last month and that they requested the AI infra article. Please confirm if you want me to draft or fetch that article.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity state to update beyond acknowledging the email content

memory_cards.statement: From sam@example.com: Subject: Follow up. Great seeing you. Yes, I joined Point72 last month. Please send the AI infra article.

details: Extracted entities: sam@example.com, Point72, AI infra article

repair_options: Store the email as a memory card with the note that the sender joined Point72 last month and the request for the AI infra article remains open.
If the AI infra article is found, attach it to a follow-up memory card with a timestamp.
Create a reminder to send the AI infra article to sam@example.com.
